results.justification: EXACT TWIN — Optimal temperature for multi-sample inference + entropy turning point IS the per-tier temperature-tier routing mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — Router routes queries by problem difficulty + model capability + compute demand IS the query-class-conditional tier routing mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — Budget-aware multi-choice knapsack routing + embedding-based + contextual bandit IS the per-tier max-budget forced re-routing mechanism.
MasRouter routing in multi-agent systems covers query-class routing mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — Taxonomy-guided routing + query-class conditional selection IS the ailment-specific (query-class) routing mechanism.
Temperature-aware scheduling of LLM inference covers per-tier temperature scheduling mechanism.
Router-R1 sequential routing + multi-round aggregation covers tier-routing + budget-bounded forced re-route mechanism.
Per-step context routing + summarization covers astrologer-temporal-window gating mechanism.
